# zabbix_media_type_email (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix email media type by `id` or `name`. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts.
- `content_type` (String) Email content type.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts.
- `max_sessions` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent sessions.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SMTP authentication password. Always empty — the API does not return passwords.
- `smtp_authentication` (String) SMTP authentication method.
- `smtp_email` (String) From address for outgoing email.
- `smtp_helo` (String) SMTP HELO/EHLO hostname.
- `smtp_port` (Number) SMTP server port.
- `smtp_security` (String) SMTP connection security.
- `smtp_server` (String) SMTP server address.
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `username` (String) SMTP authentication username.

<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Read-Only:

- `eventsource` (Number) Event source type.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (Number) Recovery type.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.
